summary: Frontend regression of FLOWTYM PMS Planning v2 + Reservation Form v4 + ODMS + Reconciliation + RIE. Login OK. All Planning v2 testIDs verified (header, view-toggles 7J/15J/Mois, mode-toggles Gantt/Revenue, prev/next/today, monthpicker with 12 months, filters search/type/status/channel, 10 rooms, 300 cells). NEW availability rows fully present (planning-avail-header + 3 cats Classique/Deluxe/Superieure + 94 day cells). NEW drag-create popup works (shows Chambre 101 / Arrivée / Départ / Nuits live; release opened the ReservationFormModal pre-filled). Form v4: Statut pills present (hold/pending/confirmed, default Confirmée), form-reference filled (RES-40286), Référence sits next to Type Chambre + Numéro on same row. Country picker fully working (162 countries, search 'Algé' → 1 result, form-country-option-DZ selectable, button shows 🇩🇿Algérie). ODMS dashboard fully wired (open/sent/corrected/recovered KPIs, reliability table, reminders queue, create-open, disputes-table). Reconciliation dashboard fully wired (all KPIs, all filter chips, 4 apply / 5 dispute / 5 ignore action buttons, recon-add-open opens modal). RIE rie-reliability-table present. No console errors observed.

ui_bugs.issue: Tulip chips behave as RADIO (single-select), NOT as multi-select checkboxes. Clicking form-room-chip-102 deselects form-room-chip-101 instead of adding 102 to the selection. The badge stays at '1', recap shows '1 chambre : 102', Numéro field shows '102' (single value), and form-save label remains 'Enregistrer' (never becomes 'Enregistrer (N chambres)'). Verified: chips render as <label> wrapping <input> (10 chips: 101..302), conflict chip (204) correctly grayed-out / line-through (✓). After two consecutive force-clicks on 102 and 103, only ONE room is checked at a time.
form-save text never becomes 'Enregistrer (3 chambres)' as required by the spec, because the underlying selection state is single, not multi. Label stays 'Enregistrer' regardless of selection size.
(carry-over from iteration 4) Backdrop is a <button> containing planning-res-close <button>. React 18 hydration warning: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'.

integration_issues.flow: Tulip multi-room → useCreateReservationFromForm (1 reservation per room)
integration_issues.issue: Cannot exercise the multi-row Supabase insert path (RES-XXXXX-01/-02/-03 + totalAmount split) because the UI prevents selecting more than one room. Domain code in /app/frontend/src/domains/reservations/useCreateReservationFromForm.ts is wired but unreachable via UI in current state.

test_results.10_drag_create_NEW: PASS (planning-drag-create-popup shows 'Chambre 101 · Arrivée sam.30 mai · Départ mer.03 juin · Nuits 4'; release opens ReservationFormModal pre-filled)
test_results.11_empty_cell_click_modal: PASS (modal opens with checkIn=05/10/2026 checkOut=05/11/2026, 1 nuit — pre-fill bug from iter 4 fixed)
test_results.12_form_status_pills: PASS (form-status-pills + hold + pending + confirmed; clicking Pending switches to blue tone)
test_results.13_form_reference: PASS (RES-40286 generated, on same row as Type Chambre + Numéro)
test_results.14_form_country_picker: PASS (162 options, search 'Algé' filters to 1, form-country-option-DZ selects → button shows 🇩🇿Algérie)
test_results.15_form_tulip_badge_render: PASS (badge shows '1' inside Type Chambre field)
test_results.16_form_tulip_multi_select: FAIL — chips behave as RADIO. Selecting 102 then 103 leaves only the LAST clicked room selected; badge stays at 1, recap shows 1 chambre, save label unchanged.
test_results.17_form_tulip_conflict_grayed: PASS (chip-204 grayed out + line-through during current dates)
test_results.19_odms_dashboard_render: PASS (odms-dashboard + all 4 KPIs + reliability table + reminders queue + create-open + disputes-table)
test_results.20_recon_dashboard_render: PASS (recon-dashboard + 4 KPIs + 5 filter chips ALL/UNMATCHED/MATCHED/DISPUTED/IGNORED + 4 apply / 5 dispute / 5 ignore action buttons)
test_results.22_console_errors: 0 critical errors observed during full E2E flow (planning-res-details hydration warning carries over from iter 4 but only fires when popup is opened — not exercised in this run)

action_items: [HIGH] Fix Tulip multi-room selection: convert <input type='radio' name='rooms' /> to <input type='checkbox' /> inside form-room-chip-* labels (or remove the shared 'name' attribute that makes them mutually exclusive). The handler should APPEND to the rooms array instead of REPLACING. File: /app/frontend/src/components/modals/ReservationFormModal.tsx — section rendering form-room-chip-* with the 'CHAMBRES DISPONIBLES (1/10)' header.
[HIGH] Update form-save label to dynamically read 'Enregistrer (N chambres)' when N>1 selected rooms; disable when N=0. Same file as above.

[MEDIUM] Fix nested <button> in PlanningViewLive's planning-res-details backdrop (carry-over). Replace outer <button aria-label='Fermer'> with <div role='button' tabIndex={0} onClick={close} onKeyDown={Esc → close}>.

[LOW] Verify ODMS DRAFT→SENT auto-creates J+2 reminder in odms-reminders-queue (not exercised due to topbar overlay intercepting clicks during a sequenced test — likely just a test timing issue, recommend manual or isolated retest).
critical_code_review_comments: ReservationFormModal Tulip section appears to use a radio-group input pattern (single shared name), which contradicts the spec's multi-room requirement. The selection state model is likely a scalar (selectedRoom: string) instead of an array (selectedRooms: string[]). useCreateReservationFromForm.ts is correctly designed to loop over an array — but the form never feeds it more than one room.
The form-rooms-recap testid IS present in DOM but only after the popup closes; spec asks for it to reflect '101, 102, 103' — currently only ever shows one room because of bug #1.
Country picker is excellent (162 countries, instant search filter, flag emoji rendering). DZ test passed cleanly.
Drag-create popup is well-implemented: pointer threshold respected (>4px), live arrival/departure/nights, no popup on pure click (which opens modal pre-filled with 1 night).
Availability rows wiring is correct and live (94 cells = 15 days × 3 cats + header cells). Numbers update with reservation movements.
Reconciliation seed data (5+ rows) is present and all FSM action buttons render. Strong end-to-end.

success_rate.frontend: 21/23 PASS (91%); 2/23 FAIL — both rooted in same Tulip multi-room bug. 0 blocking-page failures.

test_credentials: walilarabi@gmail.com / Flowtym2026! (admin direction, Mas Provencal Aix). Confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: None new this iteration. Recon/ODMS pre-seeded data confirmed present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 fully validated Planning v2 (incl. NEW availability rows + drag-create), Form v4 statut/reference/country, ODMS dashboard, Recon dashboard + actions, RIE table. Two related bugs in ReservationFormModal Tulip multi-room block the multi-reservation creation flow (RES-XXXXX-01/-02/-03). After main agent fixes the radio→checkbox + save-label, retest: (a) select 3 rooms via Tulip, (b) verify form-save text becomes 'Enregistrer (3 chambres)', (c) submit and confirm 3 Supabase rows with split totalAmount. Also validate ODMS DRAFT→SENT timeline + J+2 auto-reminder which was not exercised here.
rca_of_the_issue: Tulip multi-room RCA: the form-room-chip-* labels each contain an <input> element. From the chip structure dump, all chips share the same parent in DOM and behave mutually exclusively → they are <input type='radio' name='room'> (or equivalent React state setter that REPLACES rather than TOGGLES MEMBERSHIP). Fix: change input type to 'checkbox' (no shared name) and update onChange handler to push/remove the room id from a Set/Array state — `setRooms(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(r=>r!==id) : [...prev, id])`. After fix, badge text computation should be `rooms.length`, Numéro field display should be `rooms.join(', ')`, and form-save label should be `rooms.length > 1 ? 'Enregistrer (' + rooms.length + ' chambres)' : 'Enregistrer'`.
